accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies purpose as increasing VA benefit rates effective December 1, 2024 tied to Social Security COLA.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Describes the COLA-linked increases to specific Title 38 benefit amounts.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the special rule for Public Law 85-857 persons and the administrative adjustment authority.

effective_dates.why: Notes December 1, 2024 effective date and FY2025 Federal Register publication deadline.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major provisions including benefit categories, COLA linkage, special rule, and Federal Register publication requirement.

correct_entities.why: VA, Title 38 sections, Social Security Act all correctly cited.

correct_figures.why: December 1, 2024 and November 30, 2024 reference dates correctly stated.
